microsoft_ft: Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling abstractions that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Built an **AI agent** for drill planning that restructured end-to-end workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly mirroring an agent development life cycle of build → test → iterate.

Owned the agent quality and evaluation framework for Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating across engineering, ops, and partner teams.

Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive $14M+ business impact across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI copilot adoption** for code-generation workflows, running user demos and training sessions that onboarded 14 key Azure service teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly through automated build assistance.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, identifying critical workflow gaps and translating findings into prioritized feature requirements.

Improved agent knowledge retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster iteration cycles.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, defining modular workflows that composed reusable execution paths across services.

Built a product strategy to eliminate manual toil during region launches — conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of per-region effort** and roadmapping automation for the highest-impact critical paths.

Engineered a **Power BI evaluation dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership actionable signal to target automation gaps and continuously improve platform performance.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — applying rigorous pre-deployment simulation and validation principles.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake and testing workflow.
Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment and iteration cycle by 25%.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM workflow, applying customer-obsessed iteration to a core operational loop.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile based on performance signal analysis.
Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify and close margin leaks, translating raw data into actionable financial recommendations.
